pictures.title: 小猫
pictures.summary: 慵懒地蜷缩在窗台上，小猫用柔软的呼噜声编织着午后的美梦。
pictures.full_text: 慵懒地蜷缩在窗台上，小猫用柔软的呼噜声编织着午后的美梦。它是家中的小精灵，用一双明亮的眼睛洞察世间万物。
pictures.full_text_en: Curled up lazily on the windowsill, the kitten weaves afternoon dreams with soft purrs. It is the household's little elf, observing the world with bright eyes.

pictures.title: 小狗
pictures.summary: 摇着尾巴奔向主人，小狗是忠诚与快乐的化身。
pictures.full_text: 摇着尾巴奔向主人，小狗是忠诚与快乐的化身。它的世界很简单，一个拥抱就是整个天堂。
pictures.full_text_en: Wagging its tail and running to its owner, the puppy is the embodiment of loyalty and joy. Its world is simple—one hug is all of heaven.

pictures.title: 小兔
pictures.summary: 长长的耳朵竖起来，红红的眼睛眨呀眨。
pictures.full_text: 长长的耳朵竖起来，红红的眼睛眨呀眨。小兔是春天里最温柔的使者，蹦蹦跳跳间带来满园生机。
pictures.full_text_en: Long ears perked up, red eyes blinking. The bunny is spring's gentlest messenger, hopping about and bringing vitality to the garden.

pictures.title: 仓鼠
pictures.summary: 圆滚滚的身体塞满了腮帮子，仓鼠是小小的美食家。
pictures.full_text: 圆滚滚的身体塞满了腮帮子，仓鼠是小小的美食家。它把整个秋天都藏进了地洞里，为冬天准备着最甜蜜的惊喜。
pictures.full_text_en: With a round body and stuffed cheeks, the hamster is a tiny gourmet. It hides the whole autumn in its burrow, preparing the sweetest surprises for winter.

pictures.title: 金鱼
pictures.summary: 摇曳着轻纱般的尾巴，金鱼在水中翩翩起舞。
pictures.full_text: 摇曳着轻纱般的尾巴，金鱼在水中翩翩起舞。它是流动的艺术品，用橙红色的身姿点亮了整个鱼缸。
pictures.full_text_en: Swaying its gauzy tail, the goldfish dances gracefully in the water. It is a flowing work of art, lighting up the entire fishbowl with its orange-red figure.

pictures.title: 小鸡
pictures.summary: 毛茸茸的黄球在地上滚来滚去，小鸡是春天最萌的音符。
pictures.full_text: 毛茸茸的黄球在地上滚来滚去，小鸡是春天最萌的音符。叽叽喳喳地唱着歌，每一声都是对生命的赞美。
pictures.full_text_en: Fluffy yellow balls rolling on the ground, chicks are spring's cutest notes. Chirping their songs, every sound is a hymn to life.

pictures.title: 乌龟
pictures.summary: 背着小房子慢悠悠地散步，乌龟是时间的智者。
pictures.full_text: 背着小房子慢悠悠地散步，乌龟是时间的智者。它不急不躁，一步一步，走出了属于自己的风景。
pictures.full_text_en: Carrying its little house on a leisurely stroll, the turtle is a sage of time. Unhurried and calm, step by step, it walks its own landscape.

pictures.title: 小猪
pictures.summary: 圆滚滚的鼻子拱来拱去，小猪是农场里最快乐的小胖子。
pictures.full_text: 圆滚滚的鼻子拱来拱去，小猪是农场里最快乐的小胖子。它用泥巴做面膜，用哼哼声唱情歌，生活简单而满足。
pictures.full_text_en: With a round snout rooting about, the piglet is the happiest little chubby one on the farm. It uses mud as a face mask, sings love songs with grunts—life is simple and satisfying.

pictures.title: 绵羊
pictures.summary: 像一朵行走的白云，绵羊温柔地漫步在绿草地上。
pictures.full_text: 像一朵行走的白云，绵羊温柔地漫步在绿草地上。它那蓬松的羊毛是冬日里最温暖的承诺，是大自然赐予的柔软礼物。
pictures.full_text_en: Like a walking white cloud, the sheep gently roams the green meadow. Its fluffy wool is winter's warmest promise, a soft gift from nature.

pictures.title: 奶牛
pictures.summary: 黑白相间的花纹是它独特的时尚宣言，奶牛是牧场里最优雅的女士。
pictures.full_text: 黑白相间的花纹是它独特的时尚宣言，奶牛是牧场里最优雅的女士。每一滴牛奶都是它对世界的温柔馈赠。
pictures.full_text_en: Black-and-white patches are its unique fashion statement, the cow is the ranch's most elegant lady. Every drop of milk is her gentle gift to the world.

pictures.title: 小马
pictures.summary: 飘逸的鬃毛随风飞扬，小马是草原上自由的风。
pictures.full_text: 飘逸的鬃毛随风飞扬，小马是草原上自由的风。它用蹄声敲击大地，奏响属于旷野的乐章。
pictures.full_text_en: Flowing mane flying in the wind, the pony is the free wind of the prairie. It strikes the earth with hooves, playing the wilderness's melody.

pictures.title: 鸭子
pictures.summary: 摇摇摆摆地走过农场，嘎嘎嘎地唱着歌。
pictures.full_text: 摇摇摆摆地走过农场，嘎嘎嘎地唱着歌。鸭子是池塘里最忙碌的小船，划出一道道快乐的水波纹。
pictures.full_text_en: Waddling across the farm, quacking its song. The duck is the pond's busiest little boat, leaving trails of happy ripples.

pictures.title: 小鹅
pictures.summary: 昂首挺胸地巡视着领地，小鹅是农场里最尽职的小保安。
pictures.full_text: 昂首挺胸地巡视着领地，小鹅是农场里最尽职的小保安。它虽然个头不大，却有着保护伙伴的勇气。
pictures.full_text_en: Prowling its territory with head held high, the gosling is the farm's most dutiful little guard. Though small in size, it has the courage to protect its companions.

pictures.title: 山羊
pictures.summary: 站在陡峭的山崖上，山羊是攀岩的高手。
pictures.full_text: 站在陡峭的山崖上，山羊是攀岩的高手。它那小小的胡须随风飘动，是山间最酷的冒险家。
pictures.full_text_en: Standing on steep cliffs, the goat is a master climber. Its little beard swaying in the wind, it is the coolest adventurer in the mountains.

pictures.title: 小驴
pictures.summary: 长长的耳朵是它的天线，小驴是农场里最勤劳的伙伴。
pictures.full_text: 长长的耳朵是它的天线，小驴是农场里最勤劳的伙伴。它虽然倔强，却有着最踏实的心。
pictures.full_text_en: Long ears are its antennae, the donkey is the farm's most hardworking companion. Though stubborn, it has the most steadfast heart.

pictures.title: 小鹿
pictures.summary: 斑驳的阳光洒在林间，小鹿轻盈地穿过树丛。
pictures.full_text: 斑驳的阳光洒在林间，小鹿轻盈地穿过树丛。它那温柔的大眼睛里映着整片森林，是林中最美的精灵。
pictures.full_text_en: Dappled sunlight falls through the trees, the fawn lightly crosses the thicket. Its gentle big eyes reflect the entire forest, the most beautiful spirit in the woods.

pictures.title: 松鼠
pictures.summary: 抱着松果大快朵颐，松鼠是森林里最忙碌的收藏家。
pictures.full_text: 抱着松果大快朵颐，松鼠是森林里最忙碌的收藏家。它把坚果藏在树洞里，为冬天准备着满满的幸福。
pictures.full_text_en: Munching on pine cones, the squirrel is the forest's busiest collector. It hides nuts in tree hollows, preparing abundant happiness for winter.

pictures.title: 狐狸
pictures.summary: 披着火红的大衣穿行于林间，狐狸是森林里最聪明的谋士。
pictures.full_text: 披着火红的大衣穿行于林间，狐狸是森林里最聪明的谋士。它那灵动的眼神中藏着大自然的智慧。
pictures.full_text_en: Wearing a fiery red coat through the forest, the fox is the woods' cleverest strategist. Its nimble eyes hold the wisdom of nature.

pictures.title: 熊猫
pictures.summary: 抱着竹子悠然自得，熊猫是国宝级的萌物。
pictures.full_text: 抱着竹子悠然自得，熊猫是国宝级的萌物。黑白分明的配色是它天生的礼服，慵懒的姿态是它对生活的态度。
pictures.full_text_en: Hugging bamboo and lounging contentedly, the panda is a national treasure-level cutie. Its black-and-white coloring is its innate formal wear, its lazy posture its attitude toward life.

pictures.title: 考拉
pictures.summary: 抱着桉树打盹儿，考拉是澳洲最佛系的居民。
pictures.full_text: 抱着桉树打盹儿，考拉是澳洲最佛系的居民。它一天要睡二十个小时，是慢生活的最佳代言人。
pictures.full_text_en: Dozing while hugging a eucalyptus tree, the koala is Australia's most Zen resident. It sleeps twenty hours a day, the best spokesperson for slow living.

pictures.title: 刺猬
pictures.summary: 浑身是刺却内心柔软，刺猬是自我保护的专家。
pictures.full_text: 浑身是刺却内心柔软，刺猬是自我保护的专家。它蜷成一个小球，把脆弱藏在刺的盔甲之下。
pictures.full_text_en: Covered in spikes yet soft inside, the hedgehog is a self-protection expert. It curls into a little ball, hiding vulnerability beneath its spiny armor.

pictures.title: 猫头鹰
pictures.summary: 睁着圆溜溜的大眼睛守候夜空，猫头鹰是暗夜里的智者。
pictures.full_text: 睁着圆溜溜的大眼睛守候夜空，猫头鹰是暗夜里的智者。它无声地飞翔，是月光下最神秘的守护者。
pictures.full_text_en: Watching the night sky with round big eyes, the owl is the sage of the dark. It flies silently, the most mysterious guardian under the moonlight.

pictures.title: 海豚
pictures.summary: 跃出海面的瞬间，海豚划出一道优美的弧线。
pictures.full_text: 跃出海面的瞬间，海豚划出一道优美的弧线。它是大海的微笑，用欢快的叫声传递着海洋的快乐。
pictures.full_text_en: In the moment it leaps from the sea, the dolphin traces a graceful arc. It is the ocean's smile, conveying marine joy with cheerful calls.

pictures.title: 企鹅
pictures.summary: 穿着燕尾服摇摇摆摆，企鹅是南极最绅士的居民。
pictures.full_text: 穿着燕尾服摇摇摆摆，企鹅是南极最绅士的居民。它在冰天雪地中坚守着温暖，用身体守护着每一颗蛋。
pictures.full_text_en: Waddling in a tuxedo, the penguin is Antarctica's most gentlemanly resident. It holds fast to warmth in the ice and snow, guarding each egg with its body.

pictures.title: 小鲸鱼
pictures.summary: 喷出高高的水柱，小鲸鱼是海洋中温柔的巨人。
pictures.full_text: 喷出高高的水柱，小鲸鱼是海洋中温柔的巨人。它的歌声穿越千里，是大海最深情的旋律。
pictures.full_text_en: Spouting a tall water column, the baby whale is the ocean's gentle giant. Its song travels thousands of miles, the sea's most affectionate melody.

pictures.title: 蝴蝶鱼
pictures.summary: 披着绚丽的彩衣在珊瑚间穿梭，蝴蝶鱼是海底最优雅的舞者。
pictures.full_text: 披着绚丽的彩衣在珊瑚间穿梭，蝴蝶鱼是海底最优雅的舞者。它那斑斓的色彩是海洋最珍贵的画作。
pictures.full_text_en: Draped in gorgeous colors darting among corals, the butterflyfish is the seabed's most elegant dancer. Its brilliant hues are the ocean's most precious paintings.

pictures.title: 海龟
pictures.summary: 慢悠悠地划过碧蓝的海水，海龟是海洋里最古老的旅行者。
pictures.full_text: 慢悠悠地划过碧蓝的海水，海龟是海洋里最古老的旅行者。它背着岁月的痕迹，游过了千年的时光。
pictures.full_text_en: Paddling slowly through azure waters, the sea turtle is the ocean's most ancient traveler. Carrying the marks of time on its back, it has swum through millennia.

pictures.title: 鹦鹉
pictures.summary: 披着七彩的羽毛站在枝头，鹦鹉是热带雨林中最健谈的居民。
pictures.full_text: 披着七彩的羽毛站在枝头，鹦鹉是热带雨林中最健谈的居民。它学舌逗趣，是森林里最会社交的小明星。
pictures.full_text_en: Perched on a branch in seven-colored plumage, the parrot is the rainforest's most talkative resident. Mimicking speech for fun, it is the forest's most social little star.

pictures.title: 天鹅
pictures.summary: 优雅地滑过湖面，天鹅是水上的芭蕾舞者。
pictures.full_text: 优雅地滑过湖面，天鹅是水上的芭蕾舞者。它那修长的脖颈划出完美的曲线，是纯洁与优雅的化身。
pictures.full_text_en: Gliding gracefully across the lake, the swan is a ballerina on water. Its slender neck traces perfect curves, the embodiment of purity and elegance.

pictures.title: 小燕子
pictures.summary: 剪刀似的尾巴划过春风，小燕子是报春的使者。
pictures.full_text: 剪刀似的尾巴划过春风，小燕子是报春的使者。它衔泥筑巢，用勤劳编织着温暖的家。
pictures.full_text_en: Its scissor-like tail cutting through the spring breeze, the swallow is the messenger of spring. It carries mud to build its nest, weaving a warm home with diligence.
